rationale: custom.css now defines --ddx-bg-canvas: #F4EFE6, --ddx-accent-lever: #3B5B7A, imports Inter/Newsreader/Space Grotesk, and enforces border-radius: 0 across the editorial home, satisfying the DESIGN.md token wiring acceptance criteria.

findings.summary: Sharp-corner rule is scoped to body.ddx-editorial-home; non-home pages retain default radii. Acceptable since AC targets the homepage visual.
